events.title: Inflation surged to 3.8% in April, its highest level in nearly three years
events.summary: Inflation surged to 3.8% in April, its highest level in nearly three years, as the war in Iran causes a ripple effect across the economy and energy prices rise.

events.title: Map: See how gas prices have changed in the county where you live
events.summary: How much gas prices have increased during the Iran war depends entirely on where you live, an NBC News analysis of average gas price data from AAA shows.

events.title: Graphic: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
events.summary: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

events.title: Trump says ceasefire is ‘on life support’ after rejecting ‘unacceptable’ proposal from Iran
events.summary: President Donald Trump said the ceasefire with Iran is “on life support” and “unbelievably weak” after the two sides exchanged fire this weekend, with Trump labeling Iran’s peace proposal as “garbage.”

events.title: U.S. and China execute joint drug bust ahead of Trump-Xi summit
events.summary: U.S. and Chinese authorities jointly arrested five suspects in a cross-border smuggling and trafficking operation. NBC News’ Janis Mackey Frayer reports on the arrests as President Trump is set for a high-stakes summit meeting with President Xi Jinping in Beijing.

events.title: Tom Llamas in China ahead of Trump’s historic trip
events.summary: The historic summit is just days away, when President Trump will go face-to-face with China’s President Xi. Tom Llamas is on the ground in Beijing where he’ll be giving us an inside look at the talks and at what China’s doing to try and win the race for economic dominance.

events.title: Stalemate lingers as Iran waits to respond to latest U.S. peace proposal
events.summary: No breakthroughs to end the war with Iran have been made as the U.S. awaits Iran’s response to its latest peace proposal. Despite exchanging fire this week, both sides are maintaining that the month-long ceasefire still holds. NBC News’ Julie Tsikrin has the latest.

events.title: Deadly volcano eruption in Indonesia
events.summary: Three hikers are believed to be dead after a massive volcanic eruption in Indonesia. Incredible images captured by those on the mountain show ash spewing into the air. NBC News Keir Simmons reports.

events.title: It started as a joke. Now India’s Diet Coke parties are all the rage as shortages hit shelves.
events.summary: Love of Diet Coke runs deep for Ishika Gupta, but it was the fear of losing her favorite drink that took the obsession to new heights

events.summary: AL-MUGHAYYIR, OCCUPIED WEST BANK – A boy’s blood still stained the sidewalk in front of his school, days after an Israeli settler shot him dead

events.title: Anger and despair among Jewish Britons after spate of attacks
events.summary: LONDON — Britain in 2026 is a place where Jack Hur doesn’t feel safe wearing his Star of David pendant.

events.title: Americans from hantavirus-hit cruise ship being monitored for observation, U.S. officials say
events.summary: The 18 Americans who were aboard the hantavirus-stricken cruise ship Hondius arrived back in the U.S. on Monday, and two of them are in biocontainment units in Omaha, Nebraska, and Atlanta

events.title: Experts say hantavirus strain may be more contagious than first thought
events.summary: At least 11 passengers from the MV Hondius cruise ship are reported to have the Andes strain of hantavirus.

events.title: U.S. and China arrest 5 in joint drug smuggling investigation ahead of Trump trip
events.summary: U.S. and Chinese authorities jointly arrested five suspects in a cross-border smuggling and trafficking operation, Beijing said Monday, touting the cooperation ahead of President Donald Trump’s state visit this week.

events.title: U.S. Coast Guard seizes boat of husband whose wife disappeared in Bahamas
events.summary: The U.S. Coast Guard has taken possession of the sailboat owned by the American man whose wife disappeared in the Bahamas last month, an official said.

events.title: Teen dies after reuniting with parents following their release from immigration detention
events.summary: The parents of Kevin Gonzalez, 18, who had stage 4 colon cancer, had appealed to a judge to allow their expedited deportation to Mexico.

events.title: Americans evacuated from hantavirus-stricken cruise ship en route to the U.S.
events.summary: The cruise ship at the center of a deadly hantavirus outbreak arrived early Sunday off the Spanish island of Tenerife, where the process of sending most passengers back to their home countries will get underway.

events.title: Trump calls Iran’s response to U.S. peace proposal ‘totally unacceptable’
events.summary: President Donald Trump rejected Iran’s response to a U.S. proposal to bring an end to the war in the Middle East, calling the message “totally unacceptable” on Truth Social.“I have just read the response from Iran’s so-called ‘Representatives,’” Trump posted Sunday afternoon.

events.title: Birders push back on hantavirus fears tied to Argentine city
events.summary: The hantavirus outbreak on a cruise that departed from Argentina last month has cast an unwelcome spotlight on Tierra del Fuego, a region well known for its biodiversity and bird-watching, authorities and guides say

events.title: 17 American passengers aboard hantavirus-hit cruise ship will quarantine in Nebraska
events.summary: Seventeen American passengers aboard the cruise ship at the center of a hantavirus outbreak will quarantine at a Nebraska facility that specializes in handling patients with highly communicable diseases, health officials said

events.title: Spanish island braces for hantavirus cruise ship as WHO urges calm amid protests
events.summary: The head of the World Health Organization made an appeal to locals in Tenerife to remain calm it prepared to receive passengers from a hantavirus-hit cruise ship that has left three people dead and sparked growing local outrage.

events.title: More than 100 sickened in norovirus outbreak aboard Caribbean Princess cruise
events.summary: Even after more than 100 passengers and crewmembers fell sick during a norovirus outbreak aboard the Caribbean Princess cruise ship, passenger Jan van Milligen said life on board still felt surprisingly normal.“The normal atmosphere is still here,” van Milligen, who has spent the last 21 days aboard the ship with relatives and friends from South Africa, told NBC News on Saturday.

events.title: North Korean troops join Putin’s scaled-back parade as Ukraine agrees temporary ceasefire
events.summary: There were no neat rows of tanks or ballistic missile carriers rolling down the smooth cobbles of Moscow’s Red Square on Saturday, as Russia scaled back what is usually a grand militaristic Victory Day parade celebrating the Soviet Union’s role in defeating Nazi Germany

events.title: Iran could withstand U.S. blockade for months, Western officials and experts say
events.summary: WASHINGTON — The U.S. military blockade of Iran’s ports will eventually deprive Tehran of crucial oil revenue, but the regime could likely withstand the pressure for months without a major economic crisis or lasting damage to its oil fields, energy industry analysts and two Western officials familiar with intelligence assessments told NBC News
